# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docAfter:
# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals



## Q2 Goals



## Q1 Goals
* Improve system latency by 15%
* Optimize database queries for faster response times
* Implement code profiling to identify and resolve performance bottlenecks
## Q2 Goals
* Implement new user authentication module
* Develop the real-time data visualization dashboard
* Integrate mobile application support
